prose:
**Frontier-orbital gap for pyridine** — DFT, tier standard (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, no density fitting) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: single-point on the supplied pyridine.xyz (no geometry optimization). SCF converged in 10 cycles; no warnings reported.

Results:
  • HOMO = –7.2525992 eV  
  • LUMO = –1.1127860 eV  
  → HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.1398131 eV

Files:
  • JSON output: pyridine_frontier_dft.json  
  • Live log (SCF/DFT output): frontier-<timestamp>.out  
Command:
```
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier   \
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz   \
  --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout path   \
  --out pyridine_frontier_dft.json
```
